descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-4 to earn Centennial Cup tournament berth in best-of-seven Western Canada Tier Two junior hockey playoff series.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes advanced to the Centennial Cup tournament with a 5-4 victory over the Humboldt Broncos on April 29, 1987, clinching the best-of-seven Western Canada playoff series. Dave Tomlinson scored the winning goal with 2:37 remaining in regulation. The Sockeyes will compete in the Centennial Cup tournament in Humboldt alongside Pembroke, Ontario and Dartmouth, Nova Scotia. The article also covers personnel changes with the Lloydminster Lancers hockey organization.
